stench.enDesc: By releasing a stench when attacking, the Pokémon may cause the target to flinch.
stench.zhDesc: 發出臭氣， 在攻擊的時候， 有時會使對手畏縮。

drizzle.enDesc: The Pokémon makes it rain when it enters a battle.
drizzle.zhDesc: 出場時， 會將天氣變為下雨。

speed-boost.enDesc: The Pokémon's Speed stat is boosted every turn.

battle-armor.enDesc: Hard armor protects the Pokémon from critical hits.
battle-armor.zhDesc: 被堅硬的甲殼守護著， 不會被對手的攻擊擊中要害。

sturdy.enDesc: The Pokémon cannot be knocked out by a single hit as long as its HP is full. One-hit KO moves will also fail to knock it out.
sturdy.zhDesc: 受到對手的招式攻擊時 不會被一擊打倒。 一擊必殺的招式也沒有效果。

damp.enDesc: The Pokémon dampens its surroundings, preventing all Pokémon from using explosive moves such as Self-Destruct.
damp.zhDesc: 透過把周圍都弄濕， 使誰都無法使用自爆等爆炸類的招式。

limber.enDesc: The Pokémon's limber body prevents it from being paralyzed.
limber.zhDesc: 因為身體柔軟， 不會陷入麻痺狀態。

sand-veil.enDesc: Boosts the Pokémon's evasiveness in a sandstorm.
sand-veil.zhDesc: 在沙暴中 閃避率會提高。

static.enDesc: The Pokémon is charged with static electricity and may paralyze attackers that make direct contact with it.
static.zhDesc: 身上帶有靜電， 有時會令接觸到的對手麻痺。

volt-absorb.enDesc: If hit by an Electric-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.
volt-absorb.zhDesc: 受到電屬性的招式攻擊時， 不會受到傷害，而是會回復。

water-absorb.enDesc: If hit by a Water-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.
water-absorb.zhDesc: 受到水屬性的招式攻擊時， 不會受到傷害，而是會回復。

oblivious.enDesc: The Pokémon is oblivious, keeping it from being infatuated, falling for taunts, or being affected by Intimidate.
oblivious.zhDesc: 感覺遲鈍， 不會陷入著迷和被挑釁狀態。

cloud-nine.zhDesc: 任何天氣的影響都會消失。

compound-eyes.enDesc: The Pokémon's compound eyes boost its accuracy.
compound-eyes.zhDesc: 因為擁有複眼， 會提高招式的命中率。

insomnia.enDesc: The Pokémon is suffering from insomnia and cannot fall asleep.
insomnia.zhDesc: 因為有著睡不著的體質， 所以不會陷入睡眠狀態。

color-change.enDesc: The Pokémon’s type becomes the type of the move used on it.
color-change.zhDesc: 自己的屬性會變為 擊中自己的對手招式的屬性。

immunity.enDesc: The Pokémon's immune system prevents it from being poisoned.
immunity.zhDesc: 因為體內擁有免疫能力， 不會陷入中毒狀態。

flash-fire.enDesc: If hit by a Fire-type move, the Pokémon absorbs the flames and uses them to power up its own Fire-type moves.
flash-fire.zhDesc: 受到火屬性的招式攻擊時， 吸收火焰，讓自己使出的 火屬性招式變強。

shield-dust.enDesc: Protective dust shields the Pokémon from the additional effects of moves.
shield-dust.zhDesc: 被鱗粉守護著， 不會受到招式的追加效果影響。

own-tempo.enDesc: The Pokémon sticks to its own tempo, preventing it from becoming confused or being affected by Intimidate.
own-tempo.zhDesc: 因為我行我素， 不會陷入混亂狀態。

suction-cups.enDesc: The Pokémon uses suction cups to stay in one spot. This protects it from moves and items that would force it to switch out.
suction-cups.zhDesc: 用吸盤將自己牢牢吸附在地面上， 讓替換寶可夢的招式和道具失效。

intimidate.enDesc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it intimidates opposing Pokémon and makes them cower, lowering their Attack stats.
intimidate.zhDesc: 出場時威嚇對手， 使其退縮， 從而降低對手的攻擊。

shadow-tag.enDesc: The Pokémon steps on the opposing Pokémon's shadows to prevent them from fleeing or switching out.
shadow-tag.zhDesc: 踩住對手的影子 使其無法逃走或替換。

rough-skin.enDesc: The Pokémon's rough skin damages attackers that make direct contact with it.
rough-skin.zhDesc: 受到攻擊時， 用粗糙的皮膚弄傷 接觸到自己的對手。

wonder-guard.enDesc: Its mysterious power only lets supereffective moves hit the Pokémon.
wonder-guard.zhDesc: 不可思議的力量， 只有效果絕佳的招式才會擊中自己。

levitate.enDesc: By floating in the air, the Pokémon receives full immunity to all Ground-type moves.
levitate.zhDesc: 從地面浮起， 從而不會受到地面屬性招式的攻擊。

effect-spore.enDesc: Contact with the Pokémon may inflict poison, sleep, or paralysis on the attacker.
effect-spore.zhDesc: 受到攻擊時， 有時會讓接觸到自己的對手 陷入中毒、麻痺或睡眠狀態。

synchronize.enDesc: If the Pokémon is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned by another Pokémon, that Pokémon will be inflicted with the same status condition.
synchronize.zhDesc: 將自己的中毒、麻痺或 灼傷狀態傳染給對手。

clear-body.enDesc: Prevents other Pokémon's moves or Abilities from lowering the Pokémon's stats.
clear-body.zhDesc: 不會因對手的招式或特性 而被降低能力。

natural-cure.enDesc: The Pokémon's status conditions are cured when it switches out.
natural-cure.zhDesc: 異常狀態會在 離場後治癒。

lightning-rod.enDesc: The Pokémon draws in all Electric-type moves. Instead of taking damage from them, its Sp. Atk stat is boosted.
lightning-rod.zhDesc: 將電屬性的招式吸引到自己身上， 不但不會受到傷害，反而會提高特攻。

serene-grace.enDesc: Raises the likelihood of additional effects occurring when the Pokémon uses its moves.
serene-grace.zhDesc: 受到上天保佑， 容易出現招式的追加效果。

swift-swim.enDesc: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in rain.
swift-swim.zhDesc: 天氣為下雨時， 速度會提高。

chlorophyll.enDesc: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in harsh sunlight.
chlorophyll.zhDesc: 天氣為晴朗時， 速度會提高。

illuminate.enDesc: By illuminating its surroundings, the Pokémon prevents its accuracy from being lowered.
illuminate.zhDesc: 透過讓周圍變亮， 變得容易遇見野生的寶可夢。

trace.enDesc: When it enters a battle, the Pokémon copies an opposing Pokémon's Ability.
trace.zhDesc: 出場時，複製對手的特性， 變為與之相同的特性。

huge-power.zhDesc: 物理攻擊的威力會變為２倍。

poison-point.enDesc: Contact with the Pokémon may poison the attacker.
poison-point.zhDesc: 有時會讓接觸到自己的 對手陷入中毒狀態。

inner-focus.enDesc: The Pokémon's intense focus prevents it from flinching or being affected by Intimidate.
inner-focus.zhDesc: 靠著經過鍛鍊的精神， 不會因對手的攻擊而畏縮。

magma-armor.enDesc: The Pokémon’s hot magma coating prevents it from being frozen.
magma-armor.zhDesc: 將熾熱的熔岩覆蓋在身上， 不會陷入冰凍狀態。

water-veil.enDesc: The Pokémon's water veil prevents it from being burned.
water-veil.zhDesc: 將水幕裹在身上， 不會陷入灼傷狀態。

magnet-pull.enDesc: Prevents Steel-type Pokémon from fleeing by pulling them in with magnetism.
magnet-pull.zhDesc: 用磁力吸住鋼屬性的寶可夢， 使其無法逃走。

soundproof.enDesc: Soundproofing gives the Pokémon full immunity to all sound-based moves.
soundproof.zhDesc: 透過遮蔽聲音， 不受到聲音招式的攻擊。

rain-dish.enDesc: The Pokémon gradually regains HP in rain.
rain-dish.zhDesc: 天氣為下雨時， 會漸漸回復ＨＰ。

sand-stream.enDesc: The Pokémon summons a sandstorm when it enters a battle.
sand-stream.zhDesc: 出場時， 會把天氣變為沙暴。

pressure.enDesc: Puts other Pokémon under pressure, causing them to expend more PP to use their moves.
pressure.zhDesc: 給予對手壓迫感， 大量減少其使用招式的ＰＰ。

thick-fat.enDesc: The Pokémon is protected by a layer of thick fat, which halves the damage taken from Fire- and Ice-type moves.
thick-fat.zhDesc: 被厚厚的脂肪保護著， 能夠讓火屬性和冰屬性 招式的傷害減半。

early-bird.enDesc: The Pokémon awakens from sleep twice as fast as other Pokémon.
early-bird.zhDesc: 即使陷入睡眠狀態， 也能以２倍的速度提早醒來。

flame-body.enDesc: Contact with the Pokémon may burn the attacker.
flame-body.zhDesc: 有時會讓接觸到自己的 對手陷入灼傷狀態。

run-away.enDesc: Enables a sure getaway from wild Pokémon.
run-away.zhDesc: 一定能從野生寶可夢 那裡逃走。

keen-eye.enDesc: The Pokémon's keen eyes prevent its accuracy from being lowered.
keen-eye.zhDesc: 靠著銳利的目光， 命中率不會被降低。

hyper-cutter.enDesc: The Pokémon's prized, mighty pincers prevent other Pokémon from lowering its Attack stat.
hyper-cutter.zhDesc: 因為擁有以力量為傲的鉗子， 不會被對手降低攻擊。

pickup.enDesc: The Pokémon may pick up an item another Pokémon used during a battle. It may pick up items outside of battle, too.
pickup.zhDesc: 有時會撿來對手用過的道具。 冒險過程中也會撿來。

truant.enDesc: Each time the Pokémon uses a move, it spends the next turn loafing around.
truant.zhDesc: 如果使出招式， 下一回合就需要休息。

hustle.enDesc: Boosts the Pokémon's Attack stat but lowers its accuracy.
hustle.zhDesc: 自己的攻擊雖會變高， 但命中率會降低。

cute-charm.enDesc: The Pokémon may infatuate attackers that make direct contact with it.
cute-charm.zhDesc: 有時會讓接觸到自己的對手 陷入著迷狀態。

plus.enDesc: Boosts the Sp. Atk stat of the Pokémon if an ally with the Plus or Minus Ability is also in battle.
plus.zhDesc: 場上的夥伴之中， 如果有正電或負電特性的寶可夢， 自己的特攻會提高。

minus.enDesc: Boosts the Sp. Atk stat of the Pokémon if an ally with the Plus or Minus Ability is also in battle.
minus.zhDesc: 場上的夥伴之中， 如果有正電或負電特性的寶可夢， 自己的特攻會提高。

forecast.enDesc: The Pokémon transforms with the weather to change its type to Water, Fire, or Ice.
forecast.zhDesc: 在天氣的影響下， 會變成水屬性、火屬性 或冰屬性之中的一種。

sticky-hold.enDesc: The Pokémon's held items cling to its sticky body and cannot be removed by other Pokémon.
sticky-hold.zhDesc: 道具會黏在 具有黏性的身體上， 不會被對手奪走。

shed-skin.enDesc: The Pokémon may cure its own status conditions by shedding its skin.
shed-skin.zhDesc: 透過蛻去身上的皮， 有時會治癒異常狀態。

guts.enDesc: It's so gutsy that having a status condition boosts the Pokémon's Attack stat.
guts.zhDesc: 陷入異常狀態時， 會拿出毅力， 攻擊會提高。

marvel-scale.enDesc: The Pokémon's marvelous scales boost its Defense stat if it has a status condition.
marvel-scale.zhDesc: 陷入異常狀態時， 神奇鱗片會發生反應， 防禦會提高。

liquid-ooze.enDesc: The strong stench of the Pokémon's oozed liquid damages attackers that use HP-draining moves.
liquid-ooze.zhDesc: 吸收了污泥漿的對手 會因為強烈的惡臭而 使得ＨＰ減少。

overgrow.enDesc: Powers up Grass-type moves when the Pokémon's HP is low.
overgrow.zhDesc: ＨＰ減少的時候， 草屬性的招式威力會提高。

blaze.enDesc: Powers up Fire-type moves when the Pokémon's HP is low.
blaze.zhDesc: ＨＰ減少的時候， 火屬性的招式威力會提高。

torrent.enDesc: Powers up Water-type moves when the Pokémon's HP is low.
torrent.zhDesc: ＨＰ減少的時候， 水屬性的招式威力會提高。

swarm.enDesc: Powers up Bug-type moves when the Pokémon's HP is low.
swarm.zhDesc: ＨＰ減少的時候， 蟲屬性的招式威力會提高。

rock-head.enDesc: Protects the Pokémon from recoil damage.
rock-head.zhDesc: 即使使出會受反作用力傷害的招式， ＨＰ也不會減少。

drought.enDesc: Turns the sunlight harsh when the Pokémon enters a battle.
drought.zhDesc: 出場時， 會將天氣變為晴朗。

arena-trap.enDesc: Prevents opposing Pokémon from fleeing from battle.
arena-trap.zhDesc: 在戰鬥中讓對手無法逃走。

vital-spirit.enDesc: The Pokémon is full of vitality, and that prevents it from falling asleep.
vital-spirit.zhDesc: 透過激發出幹勁， 不會陷入睡眠狀態。

white-smoke.enDesc: The Pokémon is protected by its white smoke, which prevents other Pokémon from lowering its stats.
white-smoke.zhDesc: 被白色煙霧保護著， 不會被對手降低能力。

pure-power.enDesc: Using its pure power, the Pokémon doubles its Attack stat.
pure-power.zhDesc: 因瑜伽的力量， 物理攻擊的威力會變為２倍。

shell-armor.enDesc: A hard shell protects the Pokémon from critical hits.
shell-armor.zhDesc: 被堅硬的殼保護著， 對手的攻擊不會擊中要害。

air-lock.zhDesc: 所有天氣的影響都會消失。

tangled-feet.enDesc: Boosts the Pokémon's evasiveness if it is confused.
tangled-feet.zhDesc: 陷入混亂狀態時， 閃避率會提高。

motor-drive.enDesc: The Pokémon takes no damage when hit by Electric-type moves. Instead, its Speed stat is boosted.
motor-drive.zhDesc: 受到電屬性的招式攻擊時， 不但不會受到傷害，反而速度會提高。

rivalry.enDesc: The Pokémon's competitive spirit makes it deal more damage to Pokémon of the same gender, but less damage to Pokémon of the opposite gender.
rivalry.zhDesc: 面對性別相同的對手， 會燃起鬥爭心，變得更強。 面對性別不同的對手時則會變弱。

steadfast.enDesc: The Pokémon's determination boosts its Speed stat every time it flinches.
steadfast.zhDesc: 每次畏縮時， 不屈之心就會燃起， 速度也會提高。

snow-cloak.enDesc: Boosts the Pokémon's evasiveness in snow.
snow-cloak.zhDesc: 天氣為冰雹時， 閃避率會提高。

gluttony.enDesc: If the Pokémon is holding a Berry to be eaten when its HP is low, it will instead eat the Berry when its HP drops to half or less.
gluttony.zhDesc: 原本ＨＰ變得很少時才會吃的樹果， 在ＨＰ還有一半時就會把它吃掉。

anger-point.enDesc: The Pokémon is angered when it takes a critical hit, and that maxes its Attack stat.
anger-point.zhDesc: 要害被擊中時會大發雷霆。 攻擊力會提高到最大。

unburden.enDesc: Boosts the Speed stat if the Pokémon's held item is used or lost.
unburden.zhDesc: 失去所持有的道具時， 速度會提高。

heatproof.enDesc: The Pokémon's heatproof body halves the damage taken from Fire-type moves.
heatproof.zhDesc: 靠著耐熱的體質， 讓火屬性的招式威力減半。

simple.enDesc: Doubles the effects of the Pokémon's stat changes.
simple.zhDesc: 能力變化會變為平時的２倍。

dry-skin.enDesc: Restores the Pokémon's HP in rain or when it is hit by Water-type moves. Reduces HP in harsh sunlight, and increases the damage received from Fire-type moves.
dry-skin.zhDesc: 下雨天氣時和受到水屬性的招式攻擊時， ＨＰ會回復。晴朗天氣時和受到火屬性的 招式攻擊時，ＨＰ會減少。

download.enDesc: The Pokémon compares an opposing Pokémon's Defense and Sp. Def stats before raising its own Attack or Sp. Atk stat—whichever will be more effective.
download.zhDesc: 比較對手的防禦和特防， 根據較低的那項能力 相應地提高自己的攻擊或特攻。

iron-fist.zhDesc: 使用到拳頭的招式 威力會提高。

poison-heal.enDesc: If poisoned, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.
poison-heal.zhDesc: 陷入中毒狀態時， ＨＰ不會減少，反而會漸漸增加。

adaptability.enDesc: Powers up moves of the same type as the Pokémon.
adaptability.zhDesc: 與自身同屬性的招式 威力會提高。

skill-link.enDesc: Maximizes the number of times multistrike moves hit.
skill-link.zhDesc: 使用連續招式時， 每回都能以最多次數進行攻擊。

hydration.enDesc: Cures the Pokémon's status conditions in rain.
hydration.zhDesc: 天氣為下雨時， 會治癒異常狀態。

solar-power.enDesc: In harsh sunlight, the Pokémon's Sp. Atk stat is boosted, but its HP decreases every turn.
solar-power.zhDesc: 天氣為晴朗時特攻會提高， 但每回合ＨＰ會減少。

quick-feet.enDesc: Boosts the Speed stat if the Pokémon has a status condition.
quick-feet.zhDesc: 陷入異常狀態時， 速度會提高。

normalize.enDesc: All the Pokémon’s moves become Normal type. The power of those moves is boosted a little.
normalize.zhDesc: 無論是什麼屬性的招式， 全部都會變為一般屬性。 威力會少量提高。

sniper.enDesc: If the Pokémon's attack lands a critical hit, the attack is powered up even further.
sniper.zhDesc: 擊中要害時， 威力會進一步提高。

magic-guard.enDesc: The Pokémon only takes damage from attacks.
magic-guard.zhDesc: 不會受到攻擊以外的傷害。

no-guard.enDesc: The Pokémon employs no-guard tactics to ensure incoming and outgoing attacks always land.
no-guard.zhDesc: 由於無防守戰術， 雙方使出的招式都必定會擊中。

stall.enDesc: The Pokémon is always the last to use its moves.
stall.zhDesc: 使出招式的順序 必定會變為最後。

technician.enDesc: Powers up weak moves so the Pokémon can deal more damage with them.
technician.zhDesc: 可讓威力低的招式 提高威力來進行攻擊。

leaf-guard.enDesc: Prevents status conditions in harsh sunlight.
leaf-guard.zhDesc: 天氣為晴朗時， 不會陷入異常狀態。

klutz.enDesc: The Pokémon can't use any held items.

mold-breaker.enDesc: The Pokémon's moves are unimpeded by the Ability of the target.
mold-breaker.zhDesc: 可不受特性影響， 向對手使出招式。

super-luck.enDesc: The Pokémon is so lucky that the critical-hit ratios of its moves are boosted.
super-luck.zhDesc: 因為非常幸運， 容易擊中對手的要害。

aftermath.enDesc: Damages the attacker if it knocks out the Pokémon with a move that makes direct contact.
aftermath.zhDesc: 瀕死時， 會對接觸到自己的對手造成傷害。

anticipation.enDesc: The Pokémon can sense an opposing Pokémon's dangerous moves.
anticipation.zhDesc: 察覺對手持有的 危險招式。

forewarn.enDesc: When it enters a battle, the Pokémon can tell one of the moves an opposing Pokémon has.
forewarn.zhDesc: 出場時，預見１個 對手持有的招式。

unaware.enDesc: When attacking, the Pokémon ignores the target's stat changes.
unaware.zhDesc: 可無視對手能力的變化， 進行攻擊。

tinted-lens.enDesc: The Pokémon can use “not very effective” moves to deal regular damage.
tinted-lens.zhDesc: 可將效果不好的招式 以正常的威力使出。

filter.enDesc: Reduces the power of supereffective attacks that hit the Pokémon.
filter.zhDesc: 受到效果絕佳的攻擊時， 可減弱其威力。

slow-start.enDesc: For five turns, the Pokémon's Attack and Speed stats are halved.
slow-start.zhDesc: 在５回合內， 攻擊和速度會減半。

scrappy.enDesc: The Pokémon can hit Ghost-type Pokémon with Normal- and Fighting-type moves. It is also unaffected by Intimidate.
scrappy.zhDesc: 一般屬性和格鬥屬性的招式 可擊中幽靈屬性的寶可夢。

storm-drain.enDesc: The Pokémon draws in all Water-type moves. Instead of taking damage from them, its Sp. Atk stat is boosted.
storm-drain.zhDesc: 將水屬性的招式引到自己身上， 不但不會受到傷害， 反而會提高特攻。

ice-body.enDesc: The Pokémon gradually regains HP in snow.
ice-body.zhDesc: 天氣為冰雹時， 會漸漸回復ＨＰ。

solid-rock.enDesc: Reduces the power of supereffective attacks that hit the Pokémon.
solid-rock.zhDesc: 受到效果絕佳的攻擊時， 可減弱其威力。

snow-warning.enDesc: The Pokémon makes it snow when it enters a battle.
snow-warning.zhDesc: 出場時， 會將天氣變為冰雹。

honey-gather.enDesc: The Pokémon may gather Honey after a battle.
honey-gather.zhDesc: 戰鬥結束時， 有時候會撿來甜甜蜜。

frisk.enDesc: When it enters a battle, the Pokémon can check an opposing Pokémon's held item.
frisk.zhDesc: 出場時， 可以察覺對手的持有物。

reckless.enDesc: Powers up moves that have recoil damage.
reckless.zhDesc: 會讓自己因反作用力而受傷的招式 威力會提高。

multitype.enDesc: Changes the Pokémon's type to match the plate it holds.
multitype.zhDesc: 自己的屬性會依持有的石板 或Ｚ純晶的屬性而改變。

flower-gift.enDesc: Boosts the Attack and Sp. Def stats of itself and allies in harsh sunlight.
flower-gift.zhDesc: 天氣為晴朗時， 自己和同伴的攻擊和 特防能力會提高。

bad-dreams.enDesc: Damages opposing Pokémon that are asleep.
bad-dreams.zhDesc: 給予陷入睡眠狀態的對手傷害。

pickpocket.enDesc: The Pokémon steals the held item from attackers that made direct contact with it.
pickpocket.zhDesc: 盜取接觸到自己的 對手的道具。

sheer-force.enDesc: Removes any additional effects from the Pokémon's moves, but increases the moves' power.
sheer-force.zhDesc: 招式會失去追加效果， 但可以用更高的威力使出招式。

contrary.enDesc: Reverses any stat changes affecting the Pokémon so that attempts to boost its stats instead lower them—and attempts to lower its stats will boost them.
contrary.zhDesc: 能力的變化會逆轉， 原本提高時會降低， 原本降低時會提高。

unnerve.enDesc: Unnerves opposing Pokémon and makes them unable to eat Berries.
unnerve.zhDesc: 讓對手感到緊張， 無法吃樹果。

defiant.enDesc: If the Pokémon has any stat lowered by an opposing Pokémon, its Attack stat will be boosted sharply.
defiant.zhDesc: 能力被降低時， 攻擊會大幅提高。

defeatist.enDesc: Halves the Pokémon’s Attack and Sp. Atk stats when its HP becomes half or less.
defeatist.zhDesc: ＨＰ降到一半以下時， 會變得軟弱而使得 攻擊和特攻減半。

cursed-body.enDesc: May disable a move that has dealt damage to the Pokémon.
cursed-body.zhDesc: 受到攻擊時， 有時會把對手的招式 變為定身法狀態。

healer.enDesc: Sometimes cures the status conditions of the Pokémon's allies.
healer.zhDesc: 有時會治癒同伴的異常狀態。

friend-guard.zhDesc: 可以減少我方受到的傷害。

weak-armor.enDesc: The Pokémon's Defense stat is lowered when it takes damage from physical moves, but its Speed stat is sharply boosted.
weak-armor.zhDesc: 因物理招式受到傷害時， 防禦會降低， 速度會大幅提高。

multiscale.enDesc: Reduces the amount of damage the Pokémon takes while its HP is full.
multiscale.zhDesc: ＨＰ全滿時， 受到的傷害會變少。

toxic-boost.enDesc: Powers up physical moves when the Pokémon is poisoned.
toxic-boost.zhDesc: 陷入中毒狀態時， 物理招式的威力會提高。

flare-boost.enDesc: Powers up special moves when the Pokémon is burned.
flare-boost.zhDesc: 陷入灼傷狀態時， 特殊招式的威力會提高。

harvest.enDesc: May create another Berry after one is used.
harvest.zhDesc: 可多次採收 已被使用過的樹果。

telepathy.enDesc: The Pokémon anticipates and dodges the attacks of its allies.
telepathy.zhDesc: 預測我方的攻擊， 並閃避其招式。

moody.enDesc: Every turn, one of the Pokémon's stats will be boosted sharply but another stat will be lowered.
moody.zhDesc: 每一回合，能力中的某項 會大幅提高，相對地某項會降低。

overcoat.enDesc: The Pokémon takes no damage from sandstorms. It is also protected from the effects of powders and spores.
overcoat.zhDesc: 不會受到沙暴或冰雹等的傷害。 不會受到粉末類招式的攻擊。

poison-touch.enDesc: May poison a target when the Pokémon makes contact.
poison-touch.zhDesc: 有時僅是接觸 就能讓對手中毒。

regenerator.enDesc: The Pokémon has a little of its HP restored when withdrawn from battle.
regenerator.zhDesc: 退回同行隊伍後， ＨＰ會少量回復。

big-pecks.enDesc: Prevents the Pokémon from having its Defense stat lowered.
big-pecks.zhDesc: 不會受到降低防禦的效果影響。

sand-rush.enDesc: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in a sandstorm.
sand-rush.zhDesc: 天氣為沙暴時， 速度會提高。

wonder-skin.enDesc: Makes status moves more likely to miss the Pokémon.
wonder-skin.zhDesc: 不易受到變化類招式 攻擊的身體。

analytic.enDesc: Boosts the power of the Pokémon's move if it is the last to act that turn.
analytic.zhDesc: 如果在最後使出招式， 招式的威力就會變強。

illusion.enDesc: The Pokémon fools opponents by entering battle disguised as the last Pokémon in its Trainer's party.
illusion.zhDesc: 假扮成同行隊伍中的 最後一隻寶可夢出場， 迷惑對手。

imposter.enDesc: The Pokémon transforms itself into the Pokémon it's facing.
imposter.zhDesc: 變身為當前面對的寶可夢。

infiltrator.enDesc: The Pokémon's moves are unaffected by the target's barriers, substitutes, and the like.
infiltrator.zhDesc: 可穿透對手的屏障 或替身進行攻擊。

mummy.enDesc: Contact with the Pokémon changes the attacker’s Ability to Mummy.
mummy.zhDesc: 被對手接觸到時， 會將對手變成木乃伊。

moxie.enDesc: When the Pokémon knocks out a target, it shows moxie, which boosts its Attack stat.
moxie.zhDesc: 如果打倒對手， 會充滿自信並提高攻擊。

justified.enDesc: When the Pokémon is hit by a Dark-type attack, its Attack stat is boosted by its sense of justice.
justified.zhDesc: 受到惡屬性的招式攻擊時， 因為正義感，攻擊會提高。

rattled.enDesc: The Pokémon gets scared when hit by a Dark-, Ghost-, or Bug-type attack or if intimidated, which boosts its Speed stat.
rattled.zhDesc: 受到惡屬性、幽靈屬性 和蟲屬性的招式攻擊時， 會因膽怯而使得速度提高。

magic-bounce.enDesc: The Pokémon reflects status moves instead of getting hit by them.
magic-bounce.zhDesc: 可不受到由對手使出的 變化類招式所影響，並將其反彈。

sap-sipper.enDesc: The Pokémon takes no damage when hit by Grass-type moves. Instead, its Attack stat is boosted.
sap-sipper.zhDesc: 受到草屬性的招式攻擊時， 不但不會受到傷害，反而攻擊會提高。

prankster.enDesc: Gives priority to the Pokémon's status moves.
prankster.zhDesc: 可以搶先使出變化類招式。

sand-force.enDesc: Boosts the power of Rock-, Ground-, and Steel-type moves in a sandstorm.
sand-force.zhDesc: 天氣為沙暴時， 岩石屬性、地面屬性 和鋼屬性招式的威力會提高。

iron-barbs.enDesc: Inflicts damage on the attacker upon contact with iron barbs.
iron-barbs.zhDesc: 用鐵刺給予接觸到自己的 對手傷害。

zen-mode.enDesc: Changes the Pokémon’s shape when HP is half or less.
zen-mode.zhDesc: ＨＰ變為一半以下時， 樣子會改變。

victory-star.enDesc: Boosts the accuracy of its allies and itself.
victory-star.zhDesc: 自己和同伴的命中率會提高。

turboblaze.enDesc: The Pokémon's moves are unimpeded by the Ability of the target.
turboblaze.zhDesc: 可以不受對手特性的干擾， 向對手使出招式。

teravolt.enDesc: The Pokémon's moves are unimpeded by the Ability of the target.
teravolt.zhDesc: 可以不受對手特性的干擾， 向對手使出招式。

aroma-veil.enDesc: Protects the Pokémon and its allies from effects that prevent the use of moves.
aroma-veil.zhDesc: 可防住向自己和同伴 發出的心靈攻擊。

flower-veil.enDesc: Ally Grass-type Pokémon are protected from status conditions and the lowering of their stats.
flower-veil.zhDesc: 我方的草屬性寶可夢 能力不會降低。 也不會陷入異常狀態。

cheek-pouch.enDesc: The Pokémon's HP is restored when it eats any Berry, in addition to the Berry's usual effect.
cheek-pouch.zhDesc: 無論是哪種樹果， 吃下去後ＨＰ都會回復。

protean.enDesc: Changes the Pokémon's type to the type of the move it's about to use. This works only once each time the Pokémon enters battle.
protean.zhDesc: 變為與自己使出的招式 相同的屬性。

fur-coat.enDesc: Halves the damage from physical moves.
fur-coat.zhDesc: 對手的物理招式造成的 傷害會減半。

magician.enDesc: The Pokémon steals the held item from any target it hits with a move.
magician.zhDesc: 奪走被自己招式 擊中的對手的道具。

bulletproof.enDesc: Protects the Pokémon from ball and bomb moves.
bulletproof.zhDesc: 可防住對手的 球和彈類的招式。

competitive.enDesc: Boosts the Pokémon's Sp. Atk stat sharply when its stats are lowered by an opposing Pokémon.
competitive.zhDesc: 能力被降低時， 特攻會大幅提高。

strong-jaw.enDesc: The Pokémon's strong jaw boosts the power of its biting moves.
strong-jaw.zhDesc: 顎部強壯， 會提高啃咬類招式的威力。

refrigerate.enDesc: Normal-type moves become Ice-type moves. The power of those moves is boosted a little.
refrigerate.zhDesc: 一般屬性的招式 會變為冰屬性。 威力會少量提高。

sweet-veil.enDesc: Prevents the Pokémon and its allies from falling asleep.
sweet-veil.zhDesc: 我方的寶可夢 不會陷入睡眠狀態。

stance-change.enDesc: The Pokémon changes its form to Blade Forme when it uses an attack move and changes to Shield Forme when it uses King’s Shield.
stance-change.zhDesc: 若使出攻擊招式，會變為刀劍形態， 若使出招式「王者盾牌」， 會變為盾牌形態。

gale-wings.enDesc: Gives priority to the Pokémon's Flying-type moves while its HP is full.
gale-wings.zhDesc: ＨＰ全滿時， 可以搶先在對手之前 使出飛行屬性的招式。

mega-launcher.zhDesc: 波動和波導類招式的 威力會提高。

grass-pelt.enDesc: Boosts the Pokémon's Defense stat on Grassy Terrain.
grass-pelt.zhDesc: 在青草場地時， 防禦會提高。

symbiosis.enDesc: The Pokémon passes its held item to an ally that has used up an item.
symbiosis.zhDesc: 同伴使用道具時， 會把自己持有的道具交給同伴。

tough-claws.enDesc: Powers up moves that make direct contact.
tough-claws.zhDesc: 接觸到對手的招式 威力會提高。

pixilate.enDesc: Normal-type moves become Fairy-type moves. The power of those moves is boosted a little.
pixilate.zhDesc: 一般屬性的招式 會變為妖精屬性。 威力會少量提高。

gooey.enDesc: Contact with the Pokémon lowers the attacker's Speed stat.
gooey.zhDesc: 對手用攻擊接觸到自己時， 降低此對手的速度。

aerilate.enDesc: Normal-type moves become Flying-type moves. The power of those moves is boosted a little.
aerilate.zhDesc: 一般屬性的招式 會變為飛行屬性。 威力會少量提高。

dark-aura.enDesc: Powers up each Pokémon’s Dark-type moves.
dark-aura.zhDesc: 全體的惡屬性招式變強。

fairy-aura.enDesc: Powers up each Pokémon’s Fairy-type moves.
fairy-aura.zhDesc: 全體的妖精屬性招式變強。

aura-break.enDesc: The effects of “Aura” Abilities are reversed to lower the power of affected moves.
aura-break.zhDesc: 讓氣場的效果逆轉， 並降低威力。

primordial-sea.enDesc: The Pokémon changes the weather to nullify Fire-type attacks.
primordial-sea.zhDesc: 變為讓火屬性攻擊 失效的天氣。

desolate-land.enDesc: The Pokémon changes the weather to nullify Water-type attacks.
desolate-land.zhDesc: 變為讓水屬性攻擊 失效的天氣。

delta-stream.enDesc: The Pokémon changes the weather to eliminate all of the Flying type’s weaknesses.
delta-stream.zhDesc: 變為令飛行屬性的弱點 消失的天氣。

stamina.zhDesc: 受到攻擊時， 防禦會提高。
stamina.enDesc: Boosts the Defense stat when the Pokémon is hit by an attack.

wimp-out.zhDesc: ＨＰ變為一半時， 會慌慌張張逃走， 退回同行隊伍裡面。
wimp-out.enDesc: The Pokémon cowardly switches out when its HP becomes half or less.

emergency-exit.zhDesc: ＨＰ減到一半時， 為了避開危險， 會退回同行隊伍裡面。
emergency-exit.enDesc: The Pokémon, sensing danger, switches out when its HP becomes half or less.

water-compaction.zhDesc: 受到水屬性的招式攻擊時， 防禦會大幅提高。
water-compaction.enDesc: Boosts the Defense stat sharply when the Pokémon is hit by a Water-type move.

merciless.zhDesc: 攻擊中毒狀態的對手時， 必定會擊中要害。
merciless.enDesc: The Pokémon's attacks become critical hits if the target is poisoned.

shields-down.zhDesc: ＨＰ變為一半時， 殼會壞掉，變得更有攻擊性。
shields-down.enDesc: When its HP drops to half or less, the Pokémon's shell breaks and it becomes aggressive.

stakeout.zhDesc: 可以向替換出場的對手 以２倍的傷害進行攻擊。
stakeout.enDesc: Doubles the damage dealt to a target that has just switched into battle.

water-bubble.zhDesc: 降低自己受到的火屬性 招式的威力。不會灼傷。
water-bubble.enDesc: Lowers the power of Fire-type moves that hit the Pokémon and prevents it from being burned.

steelworker.zhDesc: 鋼屬性的招式威力會提高。

berserk.zhDesc: ＨＰ因對手的攻擊 降到一半時， 特攻會提高。
berserk.enDesc: Boosts the Pokémon's Sp. Atk stat when it takes a hit that causes its HP to drop to half or less.

slush-rush.zhDesc: 天氣為冰雹時， 速度會提高。
slush-rush.enDesc: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat in snow.

long-reach.zhDesc: 可以不接觸對手 就使出所有的招式。
long-reach.enDesc: The Pokémon uses its moves without making contact with the target.

liquid-voice.zhDesc: 所有的聲音招式 都變為水屬性。

triage.zhDesc: 可以搶先使出回復招式。
triage.enDesc: Gives priority to the Pokémon's healing moves.

galvanize.zhDesc: 一般屬性的招式 會變為電屬性。 威力會少量提高。
galvanize.enDesc: Normal-type moves become Electric-type moves. The power of those moves is boosted a little.

surge-surfer.zhDesc: 電氣場地時， 速度會變為２倍。
surge-surfer.enDesc: Doubles the Pokémon's Speed stat on Electric Terrain.

schooling.zhDesc: ＨＰ多的時候會聚起來變強。 ＨＰ剩餘量變少時， 群體會分崩離析。
schooling.enDesc: When it has a lot of HP, the Pokémon forms a powerful school. It stops schooling when its HP is low.

disguise.zhDesc: 用畫皮覆蓋住身體， 可防住１次攻擊。
disguise.enDesc: Once per battle, the shroud that covers the Pokémon can protect it from an attack.

battle-bond.zhDesc: 打倒對手時，與訓練家的牽絆會加深， 變化成小智版甲賀忍蛙。 飛水手裡劍的威力會增強。
battle-bond.enDesc: When the Pokémon knocks out a target, its bond with its Trainer is strengthened, and its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats are boosted.

power-construct.zhDesc: ＨＰ變為一半時， 細胞們會趕來支援， 變為完全體形態。
power-construct.enDesc: Other Cells gather to aid when its HP becomes half or less. Then the Pokémon changes its form to Complete Forme.

corrosion.zhDesc: 就算對方是鋼屬性或毒屬性寶可夢， 也可讓對方陷入中毒狀態。
corrosion.enDesc: The Pokémon can poison the target even if it's a Steel or Poison type.

comatose.zhDesc: 總是半夢半醒的狀態， 絕對不會醒來。 可在睡著的狀況下進行攻擊。
comatose.enDesc: The Pokémon is always drowsing and will never wake up. It can attack while in its sleeping state.

queenly-majesty.zhDesc: 向對手施加威懾力， 使其無法對我方使出先制招式。
queenly-majesty.enDesc: When the Pokémon uses Surf or Dive, it will come back with prey. When it takes damage, it will spit out the prey to attack.

innards-out.zhDesc: 被對手打倒的時候， 會給予對手相當於 ＨＰ剩餘量的傷害。
innards-out.enDesc: Damages the attacker landing the finishing hit by the amount equal to its last HP.

dancer.zhDesc: 當有誰使出跳舞招式時， 自己也能接著使出跳舞招式。
dancer.enDesc: Whenever a dance move is used in battle, the Pokémon will copy the user to immediately perform that dance move itself.

battery.zhDesc: 會提高我方的 特殊招式的威力。
battery.enDesc: Powers up ally Pokémon's special moves.

fluffy.zhDesc: 會將對手所給予的接觸類招式的傷害減半， 但火屬性招式的傷害會變為２倍。
fluffy.enDesc: Halves the damage taken from moves that make direct contact, but doubles that of Fire-type moves.

dazzling.zhDesc: 讓對手嚇一跳， 使其無法對我方使出先制招式。
dazzling.enDesc: The Pokémon dazzles its opponents, making them unable to use priority moves against the Pokémon or its allies.

soul-heart.zhDesc: 每當場上有寶可夢 陷入瀕死狀態時， 特攻就會提高。
soul-heart.enDesc: Boosts the Pokémon's Sp. Atk stat every time another Pokémon faints.

tangling-hair.zhDesc: 對手用攻擊接觸到自己時， 降低此對手的速度。
tangling-hair.enDesc: Contact with the Pokémon lowers the attacker's Speed stat.

receiver.zhDesc: 繼承被打倒的同伴的特性， 變為相同的特性。
receiver.enDesc: The Pokémon copies the Ability of a defeated ally.

power-of-alchemy.zhDesc: 繼承被打倒的同伴的特性， 變為相同的特性。
power-of-alchemy.enDesc: The Pokémon copies the Ability of a defeated ally.

beast-boost.zhDesc: 打倒對手的時候， 會提高自己最高的那項能力。
beast-boost.enDesc: The Pokémon boosts its most proficient stat each time it knocks out a Pokémon.

rks-system.zhDesc: 根據持有的記憶碟， 自己的屬性會改變。
rks-system.enDesc: Changes the Pokémon’s type to match the memory disc it holds.

electric-surge.zhDesc: 出場時， 會布下電氣場地。
electric-surge.enDesc: Turns the ground into Electric Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle.

psychic-surge.zhDesc: 出場時， 會布下精神場地。
psychic-surge.enDesc: Turns the ground into Psychic Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle.

misty-surge.zhDesc: 出場時， 會布下薄霧場地。
misty-surge.enDesc: Turns the ground into Misty Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle.

grassy-surge.zhDesc: 出場時， 會布下青草場地。
grassy-surge.enDesc: Turns the ground into Grassy Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle.

full-metal-body.zhDesc: 不會因對手的招式或特性 而被降低能力。
full-metal-body.enDesc: Prevents other Pokémon’s moves or Abilities from lowering the Pokémon’s stats.

shadow-shield.zhDesc: ＨＰ全滿時， 受到的傷害會變少。
shadow-shield.enDesc: Reduces the amount of damage the Pokémon takes while its HP is full.

prism-armor.zhDesc: 受到效果絕佳的攻擊時， 可減弱其威力。
prism-armor.enDesc: Reduces the power of supereffective attacks taken.

neuroforce.zhDesc: 可進一步提升 效果絕佳招式的威力。
neuroforce.enDesc: Powers up moves that are super effective.

intrepid-sword.zhDesc: 出場時， 攻擊會提高。
intrepid-sword.enDesc: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat the first time the Pokémon enters a battle.

dauntless-shield.zhDesc: 出場時， 防禦會提高。
dauntless-shield.enDesc: Boosts the Pokémon’s Defense stat the first time the Pokémon enters a battle.

libero.zhDesc: 變為與自己使出的招式 相同的屬性。
libero.enDesc: Changes the Pokémon's type to the type of the move it's about to use. This works only once each time the Pokémon enters battle.

ball-fetch.zhDesc: 當寶可夢沒有攜帶道具時， 會撿回第１個投出後 捕捉失敗的精靈球。
ball-fetch.enDesc: If the Pokémon is not holding an item, it will fetch the Poké Ball from the first failed throw of the battle.

cotton-down.zhDesc: 受到攻擊時會撒下棉絮， 降低除自己以外的 所有寶可夢的速度。
cotton-down.enDesc: When the Pokémon is hit by an attack, it scatters cotton fluff around and lowers the Speed stat of all Pokémon except itself.

propeller-tail.zhDesc: 能無視具有吸引 對手招式效果的 特性或招式的影響。
propeller-tail.enDesc: Ignores the effects of opposing Pokémon's Abilities and moves that draw in moves.

mirror-armor.zhDesc: 只反彈自己受到的 能力降低效果。
mirror-armor.enDesc: Bounces back only the stat-lowering effects that the Pokémon receives.

gulp-missile.zhDesc: 衝浪或潛水時會叼來獵物。 當受到傷害時， 會吐出獵物攻擊對手。
gulp-missile.enDesc: When the Pokémon uses Surf or Dive, it will come back with prey. When it takes damage, it will spit out the prey to attack.

stalwart.zhDesc: 能無視具有吸引 對手招式效果的 特性或招式的影響。
stalwart.enDesc: Ignores the effects of opposing Pokémon's Abilities and moves that draw in moves.

steam-engine.zhDesc: 受到水屬性或 火屬性招式攻擊時， 速度會極大幅提高。
steam-engine.enDesc: Boosts the Speed stat drastically when the Pokémon is hit by a Fire- or Water-type move.

punk-rock.zhDesc: 聲音招式的威力會提高。 受到聲音招式的傷害會減半。
punk-rock.enDesc: Boosts the power of sound-based moves. The Pokémon also takes half the damage from these kinds of moves.

sand-spit.zhDesc: 受到攻擊時， 會刮起沙暴。
sand-spit.enDesc: The Pokémon creates a sandstorm when it's hit by an attack.

ice-scales.zhDesc: 得到冰鱗粉的守護， 受到的特殊攻擊傷害會減半。
ice-scales.enDesc: The Pokémon is protected by ice scales, which halve the damage taken from special moves.

ripen.zhDesc: 讓樹果成熟， 使效果變為２倍。
ripen.enDesc: Ripens Berries and doubles their effect.

ice-face.zhDesc: 頭部的冰會代替自己承受 物理攻擊，但是樣子會改變。 下冰雹時，冰會回復原狀。
ice-face.enDesc: The Pokémon's ice head can take a physical attack as a substitute, but the attack also changes the Pokémon's appearance. The ice will be restored when it snows.

power-spot.zhDesc: 只要站在旁邊， 招式的威力就會提高。
power-spot.enDesc: Just being next to the Pokémon powers up moves.

mimicry.zhDesc: 寶可夢的屬性會隨著 場地的狀態而改變。
mimicry.enDesc: Changes the Pokémon’s type depending on the terrain.

screen-cleaner.zhDesc: 出場時，敵方和我方的 光牆、反射壁和極光幕的效果會消失。
screen-cleaner.enDesc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, the effects of Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil are nullified for both opposing and ally Pokémon.

steely-spirit.zhDesc: 我方的鋼屬性 攻擊威力會提高。
steely-spirit.enDesc: Powers up the Steel-type moves of the Pokémon and its allies.

perish-body.zhDesc: 在受到接觸類招式攻擊時， ３個回合後雙方都會陷入瀕死。 替換寶可夢後效果就會消失。
perish-body.enDesc: When hit by a move that makes direct contact, the Pokémon and the attacker will faint after three turns unless they switch out of battle.

wandering-spirit.zhDesc: 與使用接觸類招式 攻擊自己的寶可夢互換特性。
wandering-spirit.enDesc: The Pokémon exchanges Abilities with a Pokémon that hits it with a move that makes direct contact.

gorilla-tactics.zhDesc: 攻擊雖然會提高， 但只能使出 最初選擇的招式。
gorilla-tactics.enDesc: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat but only allows the use of the first selected move.

neutralizing-gas.zhDesc: 當場上有特性是化學變化氣體的寶可夢時， 所有寶可夢的特性效果 都會消失或無法發動。
neutralizing-gas.enDesc: While the Pokémon is in the battle, the effects of all other Pokémon's Abilities will be nullified or will not be triggered.

pastel-veil.zhDesc: 自己和我方同伴都不會 陷入中毒的異常狀態。
pastel-veil.enDesc: Protects the Pokémon and its ally Pokémon from being poisoned.

hunger-switch.zhDesc: 在每個回合結束時， 會在滿腹花紋和空腹花紋之間 交替改變樣子。
hunger-switch.enDesc: The Pokémon changes its form, alternating between its Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode after the end of every turn.

quick-draw.zhDesc: 有時能比對手先一步行動。
quick-draw.enDesc: Enables the Pokémon to move first occasionally.

unseen-fist.zhDesc: 只要是接觸到對手的招式， 就可以無視對手的防守效果進行攻擊。
unseen-fist.enDesc: If the Pokémon uses moves that make direct contact, it can attack the target even if the target protects itself.

curious-medicine.zhDesc: 出場時，會從貝殼撒藥， 將我方的能力變化復原。
curious-medicine.enDesc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it scatters medicine from its shell, which removes all stat changes from allies.

transistor.zhDesc: 電屬性的招式威力會提高。

dragons-maw.zhDesc: 龍屬性的招式威力會提高。

chilling-neigh.zhDesc: 打倒對手時 會用冰冷的聲音嘶鳴 並提高攻擊。
chilling-neigh.enDesc: When the Pokémon knocks out a target, it utters a chilling neigh, which boosts its Attack stat.

grim-neigh.zhDesc: 打倒對手時 會用恐怖的聲音嘶鳴 並提高特攻。
grim-neigh.enDesc: When the Pokémon knocks out a target, it utters a terrifying neigh, which boosts its Sp. Atk stat.

as-one-glastrier.zhDesc: 兼具蕾冠王的緊張感和 雪暴馬的蒼白嘶鳴這２種特性。
as-one-glastrier.enDesc: This Ability combines the effects of both Calyrex's Unnerve Ability and Glastrier's Chilling Neigh Ability.

as-one-spectrier.zhDesc: 兼具蕾冠王的緊張感和 靈幽馬的漆黑嘶鳴這２種特性。
as-one-spectrier.enDesc: This Ability combines the effects of both Calyrex's Unnerve Ability and Spectrier's Grim Neigh Ability.

lingering-aroma.enDesc: Contact with the Pokémon changes the attacker's Ability to Lingering Aroma.

seed-sower.enDesc: Turns the ground into Grassy Terrain when the Pokémon is hit by an attack.

thermal-exchange.enDesc: Boosts the Attack stat when the Pokémon is hit by a Fire-type move. The Pokémon also cannot be burned.

anger-shell.enDesc: When an attack causes its HP to drop to half or less, the Pokémon gets angry. This lowers its Defense and Sp. Def stats but boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats.

purifying-salt.enDesc: The Pokémon's pure salt protects it from status conditions and halves the damage taken from Ghost-type moves.

well-baked-body.enDesc: The Pokémon takes no damage when hit by Fire-type moves. Instead, its Defense stat is sharply boosted.

wind-rider.enDesc: Boosts the Pokémon's Attack stat if Tailwind takes effect or if the Pokémon is hit by a wind move. The Pokémon also takes no damage from wind moves.

guard-dog.enDesc: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat if intimidated. Moves and items that would force the Pokémon to switch out also fail to work.

wind-power.enDesc: The Pokémon becomes charged when it is hit by a wind move, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokémon uses.

zero-to-hero.enDesc: The Pokémon transforms into its Hero Form when it switches out.

commander.enDesc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it goes inside the mouth of an ally Dondozo if one is on the field. The Pokémon then issues commands from there.

electromorphosis.enDesc: The Pokémon becomes charged when it takes damage, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokémon uses.

protosynthesis.enDesc: Boosts the Pokémon's most proficient stat in harsh sunlight or if the Pokémon is holding Booster Energy.

quark-drive.enDesc: Boosts the Pokémon's most proficient stat on Electric Terrain or if the Pokémon is holding Booster Energy.

good-as-gold.enDesc: A body of pure, solid gold gives the Pokémon full immunity to other Pokémon's status moves.

vessel-of-ruin.enDesc: The power of the Pokémon's ruinous vessel lowers the Sp. Atk stats of all Pokémon except itself.

sword-of-ruin.enDesc: The power of the Pokémon's ruinous sword lowers the Defense stats of all Pokémon except itself.

tablets-of-ruin.enDesc: The power of the Pokémon's ruinous wooden tablets lowers the Attack stats of all Pokémon except itself.

beads-of-ruin.enDesc: The power of the Pokémon's ruinous beads lowers the Sp. Def stats of all Pokémon except itself.

orichalcum-pulse.enDesc: Turns the sunlight harsh when the Pokémon enters a battle. The ancient pulse thrumming through the Pokémon also boosts its Attack stat in harsh sunlight.

hadron-engine.enDesc: Turns the ground into Electric Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle. The futuristic engine within the Pokémon also boosts its Sp. Atk stat on Electric Terrain.

opportunist.enDesc: If an opponent's stat is boosted, the Pokémon seizes the opportunity to boost the same stat for itself.

cud-chew.enDesc: When the Pokémon eats a Berry, it will regurgitate that Berry at the end of the next turn and eat it one more time.

supreme-overlord.enDesc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, its Attack and Sp. Atk stats are slightly boosted for each of the allies in its party that have already been defeated.

costar.enDesc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it copies an ally's stat changes.

toxic-debris.enDesc: Scatters poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team when the Pokémon takes damage from physical moves.

armor-tail.enDesc: The mysterious tail covering the Pokémon's head makes opponents unable to use priority moves against the Pokémon or its allies.

earth-eater.enDesc: If hit by a Ground-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.

mycelium-might.enDesc: The Pokémon will always act more slowly when using status moves, but these moves will be unimpeded by the Ability of the target.

minds-eye.enDesc: The Pokémon ignores changes to opponents' evasiveness, its accuracy can't be lowered, and it can hit Ghost types with Normal-type and Fighting-type moves

supersweet-syrup.enDesc: Lowers the evasion of opposing Pokémon by 1 stage when first sent into battle

hospitality.enDesc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it showers its ally with hospitality, restoring a small amount of the ally's HP

toxic-chain.enDesc: The power of the Pokémon's toxic chain may badly poison any target the Pokémon hits with a move

embody-aspect.enDesc: The Pokémon's heart fills with memories, causing the Mask to shine and one of the Pokémon's stats to be boosted.

tera-shift.enDesc: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it absorbs the energy around itself and transforms into its Terastal Form.

tera-shell.enDesc: The Pokémon's shell contains the powers of each type. All damage-dealing moves that hit the Pokémon when its HP is full will not be very effective.

teraform-zero.enDesc: When Terapagos changes into its Stellar Form, it uses its hidden powers to eliminate all effects of weather and terrain, reducing them to zero.

poison-puppeteer.enDesc: Pokémon poisoned by Pecharunt's moves will also become confused.

piercing-drill.enDesc: When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets that are protecting themselves, dealing 1/4 of the damage that the move would otherwise deal. Everything aside from the target's protective effects is still triggered.

dragonize.enDesc: The Pokémon's Normal-type moves become Dragon-type moves and their power is boosted by 20%.

mega-sol.enDesc: Even when the sunlight has not turned harsh, the Pokémon can use its moves as if the weather were harsh sunlight.

spicy-spray.enDesc: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, it burns the attacker.
